title: Baseline Parity Document (NDEV-P0-01)
description: Create the Parity Baseline document mapping current status across axes (Streaming, Telemetry, Memory, MCP/Tools, UI, Security, Governance).

title: Inventory parity gaps by axis (NDEV-P0-02)
description: Inventory structured gaps per parity axis with impact and initial approach.

title: Define canonical interfaces (NDEV-P0-03)
description: Draft interface definitions for streaming, telemetry, memory, MCP/tools, and UI surfaces.

title: Phase 0 gating criteria (NDEV-P0-04)
description: Document explicit pass/fail criteria and the gate process for Phase 0.

title: Phase 0 Runbook (NDEV-P0-05)
description: Step-by-step runbook to reproduce Phase 0 and gate Phase 1.

title: Parity Scorecard skeleton (NDEV-P0-06)
description: Skeleton parity scorecard for Phase 0, to be filled after completion.

title: Phase 0 kickoff (NDEV-P0-07)
description: Schedule kickoff, publish agenda, capture minutes.

title: Crosswalk kickoff brief (NDEV-P0-08)
description: Prepare guide to fill crosswalk templates and allocate axis owners.
